metadata.description: AI cofounder — demand-side product thinking for serial entrepreneurs

plugins.name: founder-os
plugins.description: AI cofounder that helps you figure out what to build — and kill what isn't working. Demand-side product thinking with 7 consolidated skills (/demand, /measure, /build, /learn, /ideate, /ship, /founder), demand-cache.json data layer, evidence class tracking, customer-facing packaging. 31 agents, GSD execution engine, Obsidian vault sync.
